title: xanthophyllum geminatum
intro: Xanthophyllum geminatum is a plant species that belongs to the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum geminatum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
